source: SonarJava, SpotBugs, Google Java Style Guide

rules.name: null-dereference-risk
rules.message: Optional.get() without isPresent check — risks NoSuchElementException.

rules.name: blocking-calls
rules.message: Thread.sleep() blocks the current thread — avoid in production code.
rules.fix_hint: Use ScheduledExecutorService, CompletableFuture.delayedExecutor(), or reactive delay.

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to environment variables or a vault; reference via config properties.

rules.name: console-output
rules.message: Console output or printStackTrace — use a structured logger instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with logger.info/debug/warn/error from SLF4J or java.util.logging.

rules.name: generic-exception-thrown
rules.message: Generic exception thrown — use domain-specific exception types.
rules.fix_hint: Define a domain exception hierarchy and throw the specific subtype.

rules.name: catch-generic-exception
rules.message: Catching generic Exception/Throwable — catch specific exception types.
rules.fix_hint: Catch only the specific exception types you can handle; let others propagate.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named methods or use early returns / guard clauses.

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a static final constant with a descriptive name.

file_size._note: Lines of code. Implementation classes should be small and focused; tests get more room.

function_size._note: Detected via awk brace-counting, not grep.
